title: Sales Manager Vacancy at BHIVE Workspace - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at BHIVE Workspace - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
